purpose: Shared cross-language fixture for dependency-free local durable state persistence. Preview runtimes must prove a completed run, event log, artifacts, Tool Ledger data, and evidence/replay chain can survive process restart or store reopen without using an external database.

required_scenarios.name: local_store_round_trips_completed_run
required_scenarios.description: A completed run written to a local durable store can be reopened and returns the same final state and step status.

required_scenarios.name: local_store_preserves_evidence_replay_chain
required_scenarios.description: Evidence export and replay summary from the reopened store match the original event log without re-executing model or tool calls.

required_scenarios.name: local_store_uses_atomic_snapshot_write
required_scenarios.description: The local persistence implementation writes a complete snapshot using a temp file plus atomic replace, or an equivalent crash-safe snapshot mechanism documented by the implementation.

preview_status: implemented by Go, TypeScript, and Rust preview runtimes as dependency-free local persistence parity; production database adapter parity remains separate
